The '''VXI-2c electrotelescope''' was an electrotelescope manufactured by the [[Neuro-Saav Corporation]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Bolvan/Legends|Bolvan]] and [[Hija/Legends|Hija]] used it to pick up the escape pod that [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] were in.
